work.title: Pastoral Theology: The Pastor in the Various Duties of His Office
work.author: Thomas Murphy, D.D. (1823-1900)

source.kind: scanned PDF (page images + unreliable embedded OCR layer)

models.per_page_proofreading: Claude Sonnet, medium reasoning effort (one agent per page)

edition.method_note: Text is Tesseract OCR corrected by image-grounded AI proofreading deltas, not model-generated verbatim text (which Anthropic's content filter blocks).
